description: Replace query-string frontend switching with feature-owned routes, remove the historical ui-shell runtime split, and move frontend tests outside src.

userStories.title: Containerize backend E2E bootstrap
userStories.description: As a maintainer, I want backend Docker E2E services to run Alembic and baseline seed against shared SQLite storage so Docker runs start from explicit migrated data.
acceptanceCriteria: Add backend Docker E2E image or target that can run Alembic, `python scripts/seed_e2e.py`, and `uvicorn app.main:app`
Use shared E2E volume path `/var/lib/video-annotator-e2e` with `APP_DB_URL=sqlite:////var/lib/video-annotator-e2e/video-annotator-playwright.sqlite3`
Use `APP_MASKS_DIR=/var/lib/video-annotator-e2e/masks`
Add one-shot backend init command that runs `alembic upgrade head` then `python scripts/seed_e2e.py`
Backend runtime starts without reload on `0.0.0.0:8000`
Tests pass
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Containerize frontend E2E app
userStories.description: As a reviewer, I want the frontend to run in Docker with a Docker-safe API base URL so browser tests hit the backend container instead of host-only URLs.
acceptanceCriteria: Add frontend Docker E2E image or target that starts Vite E2E mode on `0.0.0.0:3000`
Docker E2E frontend uses `VITE_API_BASE_URL=http://backend:8000/api`

Frontend Docker build succeeds

userStories.title: Add Docker Compose E2E stack
userStories.description: As a maintainer, I want one compose stack for backend init, backend, frontend, and Playwright so Docker E2E starts and tears down reproducibly.
acceptanceCriteria: Add `docker-compose.e2e.yml` with services `backend-init`, `backend`, `frontend`, and `playwright`
No separate DB service is introduced; compose documents the shared SQLite-volume design
`backend` depends on successful `backend-init`
`playwright` waits on healthy frontend
`docker compose -f docker-compose.e2e.yml config` succeeds
`docker compose -f docker-compose.e2e.yml down -v --remove-orphans` removes E2E state cleanly
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Support Playwright Docker mode
userStories.description: As a maintainer, I want Playwright config to support Docker networking so the same spec set can run against containers without breaking local host-run ergonomics.
acceptanceCriteria: `tests/e2e/playwright.config.ts` supports `PLAYWRIGHT_RUN_MODE=docker`
Docker mode sets `baseURL=http://frontend:3000`
Docker mode disables local `webServer` bootstrap
`tests/e2e/global.setup.ts` keeps current local migrate-and-seed behavior outside Docker mode and becomes wait-only or no-op in Docker mode
Existing local `npm run test:e2e` still works
Existing route and review-navigation Playwright specs pass against the Docker stack
Tests pass
Typecheck passes
